Home → Discography → The Battle of Armageddon

The Battle of Armageddon

2015 · CNO Records

The second installment in the Armageddon trilogy with Bizzy Bone and AC Killer, released on Christmas Day 2015. Among the Bone-affiliated artists featured on the album is The Notorious B.I.G., who appears on the track ‘Death Is Calling‘ through an archived verse from ‘Suicidal Thoughts‘. As with the first installment, the album is entirely produced by Heinz.

"We are Cooley High, Macho Camacho, Bring on that Cobra Kai, Capo to capo."

— Magic

10 On My Own Shit produced by Heinz ▷
11 1650-1917 produced by Heinz ▷
12 The Apocalypse produced by Heinz feat. CNO Squad ▷
13 Magic produced by Heinz ▷
14 Fall To My Knees produced by Heinz feat. Qween Ching & Marjae ▷

16 1945-1982 produced by Heinz ▷
17 Back To The Ghetto produced by Heinz feat. Sara Shine ▷
18 The Lights produced by Heinz feat. Layzie Bone ▷
19 Death Is Calling produced by Heinz feat. Angels ▷
20 Drinkin Bubbly produced by Heinz ▷
21 1982-Present Day produced by Heinz ▷
